name: MacTutor
biography:
Peter Pinkerton 's father was  John Pinkerton ( born in Ireland in 1833) who was a foreman boiler maker. His mother was  Mary Harvey ( born in Stromness, Orkney in 1835) . Peter Pinkerton had five older brothers: William ( born about 1855) , David ( born about 1857) , John ( born about 1859) , Robert ( born about 1862) and James ( born about 1864) . He had a younger brother Samuel ( born about 1873) .
An obituary of Peter Pinkerton, written by John Dougall , was published in the Proceedings of the Edinburgh Mathematical Society at THIS LINK .
